modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access G Suite due to account deactivation error.

full_description_text: So, the user tried to log into G Suite, right? But they got this weird message saying their account's deactivated. It also said they're not part of the G Suite group. Kinda strange, huh?
short_description: Unable to access G Suite due to account deactivation error.
description: So, the user tried to log into G Suite, right? But they got this weird message saying their account's deactivated. It also said they're not part of the G Suite group. Kinda strange, huh?
